assessment: This does not close the 31B-QAT practical gap. It adds bounded gpu_offload timeout evidence: google/gemma-4-31b-qat did not complete build-synthetic-smoke within the 300000 ms cap, after the earlier Stream 16 gpu_partial_0.36 timeout. Treat 31B-QAT as still unproven for practical local fallback on this rig.
